subject: [INTEGRATION] Update deprecated whitelist_externals in tox
commit_message:
[INTEGRATION] Update deprecated whitelist_externals in tox

Remove deprecated whitelist_externals from tox.ini

Issue-ID: INT-2221
Change-Id: Id4328888d05b3d6a4048ca3028dd64ab64a9f92f
Signed-off-by: Marek Szwałkiewicz <marek.szwalkiewicz@external.t-mobile.pl>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/integration-xtesting-master-commit-lint/195/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/integration-xtesting-master-commit-lint/195/ )

It seems that you don"t have a commit body.

You must add at least one sentence explaining the purpose of the commit ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/integration-xtesting-master-commit-lint/195/ )
